message.content: ["The detection of floods using satellite imagery is essential for strengthening monitoring systems and early-warning mechanisms in vulnerable regions.", "This Short Narrative Review examines the effectiveness of Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) models and other recurrent neural networks (RNNs) in comparison with traditional methods and deep learning architectures based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs).", "The reviewed studies indicate that CNNs remain the most widely used and report strong performance."]

The reviewed studies indicate that CNNs remain the most widely used and report strong perform"
